channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal judge halts Texas law enabling state arrests and deportations of undocumented immigrants
item.description: A federal judge blocked Texas from enforcing a law that would let state authorities arrest and deport undocumented immigrants without federal involvement.

item.title: House Democrats fall short in vote to end Iran war as Republican support increases
item.description: House Democrats narrowly lost a vote to end President Trump's conflict with Iran, with one Democrat's procedural move helping defeat it.

item.title: Ensuring U.S. Prosperity Well Beyond 250 Years
item.description: What steps can secure America's long-term economic future and many more anniversaries?
